summary: Testing ZET Mindshare new features: Vector drawing (pen tool), VectorMenu with Add Image/AI Image/Delete options, Hand tool vector selection and dragging, Shape menus, Eraser tool, Mobile UI improvements. Backend: 24/24 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All requested features tested and working.
passed_tests: Backend: All 24 API tests passed (auth, documents, notes, ZETA AI, cloud storage)
Frontend: Editor page loads correctly with cookie auth (session_token=st_test123)
Frontend: Pen tool creates vector shapes (closed paths with filled areas)
Frontend: Pen tool auto-close works when clicking near first point (within 15px threshold)
Frontend: Hand tool selects vector paths when clicked on path stroke
Frontend: VectorMenu appears when vector is selected with hand tool
Frontend: VectorMenu contains 'Add Image', 'AI Image', 'Delete' options
Frontend: Selected vector highlighted with cyan/teal color (#4ca8ad)
Frontend: Hand tool can drag vectors (mousedown + mousemove on selected vector)
Frontend: Shape tools (triangle, square, circle) create shape elements
Frontend: Shape selection shows blue ring-2 border
Frontend: Three-dot menu button (MoreVertical) appears on selected shapes
Frontend: Shape ElementMenu contains 'Add Image', 'AI Image', 'Delete' options
Frontend: Eraser tool opens panel with Size slider (default 15px)
Frontend: Eraser tool shows visual indicator (dotted circle)
Frontend: Mobile UI - toolbar buttons are 42x42px (meets requirement)
Frontend: Mobile UI - horizontal scrolling toolbar at bottom
Frontend: Mobile UI - floating action buttons (Pages, ZETA) on right side
Frontend: Mobile UI - minimal gap (2px) between toolbar buttons
Frontend: Delete button appears in toolbox when element is selected
critical_code_review_comments: VectorMenu and ElementMenu components properly implemented with data-testid attributes
Vector selection uses isPointNearPath function with 20px threshold for reliable detection
Vector dragging updates all points with offset calculation (dx, dy translation)
Mobile CSS correctly applies 42x42px tool buttons and 2px gap via .mobile-toolbar class
Auto-close path feature implemented: clicks within 15px of first point closes the path
Shape images applied via 'image' property with backgroundImage CSS
seed_data_creation: Used existing test document doc_1ede53429c03 with session st_test123
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features tested: (1) Pen tool creates vector paths with isPen=true flag, (2) VectorMenu component shows Add Image/AI Image/Delete when clicking vector with hand tool, (3) Hand tool can drag vectors by updating all points, (4) Shape ElementMenu also has Add Image/AI Image options, (5) Eraser tool removes draw paths that intersect with eraser trail, (6) Mobile toolbar uses 42x42px buttons with 2px gap. All features working correctly. Cookie auth: set session_token cookie to st_test123.
